name: shatter-agent-review
description: Downstream-user skills for running Shatter, reviewing its output, and writing issue reports.

interface.shortDescription: Run Shatter, explain the most important cases, and draft markdown issue reports.
interface.longDescription: A downstream-user plugin for discovering repository integration targets, capturing Shatter runs, reviewing the most important observed behaviors in human terms, and writing markdown issue reports with system and project context.
defaultPrompt: Discover where Shatter should integrate in this repository.
Initialize Shatter in this repository using the project's native task surface.
Propose reviewable Shatter integration edits for ambiguous command surfaces.
Run Shatter on this target and capture review artifacts.
Review this Shatter run and explain the most important cases.
Write a markdown issue report for these Shatter findings.
